items.title: 2026/578: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG
items.description: Demolition of deconsecrated church building. Redevelopment of former methodist church site to provide a four-storey block of sixteen flats, comprising six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats
items.headline: Plans Submitted for 16 Flats at Former Hurst Green Church
items.summary: A planning application proposes demolishing the deconsecrated Methodist church on Hurstlands and building a four-storey block of 16 flats. The scheme would include six one-bedroom, eight two-bedroom and two three-bedroom homes.

data.address: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG

items.summary: A planning application seeks to split the garden at Foyle Cottage in Red Lane, Limpsfield, and build three detached houses. The plans also include landscaping, parking and a new vehicle access.

items.title: 2026/297: The Greenwood, Sandy Lane, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9LU

items.summary: Plans have been lodged to demolish a single-storey office extension and uPVC conservatory at The Greenwood on Sandy Lane, Oxted. The proposals would add an oak-framed orangery to the rear and side, plus a loft conversion to create extra living space.
